objective: Design, build, validate, and structurally complete a scalable AI Growth OS backend system (Nexyra AI) with multi-tenant architecture, database, APIs, and preparation for execution engine (Phase 2)
decisions: Use SQLite for Phase 1 instead of PostgreSQL to reduce complexity
Implement SQLAlchemy ORM for database interaction
Use Pydantic schemas for request/response validation
Separate architecture into models, services, routes, schemas
Implement StandardResponse for consistent API outputs
Convert SQLAlchemy objects to Pydantic before returning responses
Handle database integrity errors (duplicate email) in service layer
Modularize routes into user.py and tenant.py
Defer Redis, workers, and execution engine to Phase 2
Introduce Competitive Intelligence as integrated module (not separate phase)
Adopt external context files (MASTER_CONTEXT.md, PHASE_STATE.md) for continuity across chats
Define company identity as AI Operating System (Nexyra AI)
inputs: User requests for system architecture and roadmap
User terminal commands and execution outputs
User errors (duplicate file, DB errors, API errors)
User validation feedback (API working, DB verified)
User requirement for naming and company positioning
User request for competitive intelligence feature
User request for chat continuity system
User request for forensic system extraction
outputs: Replaceable code for all core backend files
Working database with tables (users, tenants, jobs)
Phase state JSON and forensic system output
dependencies: Future: External APIs for data ingestion
Future: AI models for intelligence layer
notes: Phase 1 backend system is fully built, validated, and operational with multi-tenant architecture and structured APIs. Phase 2 (Execution Engine: Redis, queues, workers) not yet implemented. Additional modules (AI engine, CI, integrations, DevOps) are designed but not executed. System has transitioned from conceptual to functional backend but not yet scalable or production-ready.
